name: Quantstamp
description: Smart-contract security firm offering audits and Chainproof insurance; builds tooling for DeFi and infrastructure protocols.

seo.title: Quantstamp — Security Scanning / Mobile App Sec
seo.meta_description: Quantstamp: Smart-contract security firm offering audits and Chainproof insurance; builds tooling for DeFi and infrastructure protocols.

when_to_use: Smart contract security audit for DeFi protocol pre-launch
Chainproof parametric insurance for audited DeFi protocols
Formal verification for critical blockchain infrastructure
Token contract audit for exchange listing compliance
Security tooling for Layer 2 and bridge contract reviews

pros: Long track record auditing major DeFi and L1 projects
Chainproof insurance product is a rare differentiator
Builds internal tooling that benefits audit quality
Academic-heavy team strong on formal methods
cons: Pricing premium versus auditor collectives and contests
Has audited protocols later exploited in the wild
Reports can be slower to deliver than competitive audits
review.verdict: Established smart contract audit firm with unique insurance angle, but not immune to high-profile misses.
review.best_for: Serious DeFi and infrastructure protocols wanting reputable audits plus optional coverage.
review.not_for: Budget-conscious teams or those preferring competitive contest-style adversarial review.
